title: Shopping & Money
shortSummary: Handle transactions, bargain, discuss prices, and shop in markets and stores. From asking '¿Cuánto cuesta?' to understanding receipts — master the language of commerce in Spanish.
whyItMatters: Money conversations happen daily. Whether you are buying groceries, shopping at a market, or discussing prices, you need the vocabulary and confidence to handle financial interactions in Spanish.
coreConcepts: Shopping vocabulary: tienda, mercado, rebaja, talla
Comparing: más barato, más caro, mejor, peor
Numbers in context: prices, quantities, sizes
Returns and exchanges: devolver, cambiar, recibo
